narrative:
Precinct Urbana 4-A (precinct in Champaign County) has 785 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points.
